subcodes.first_line: O one who is firm in the Covenant! Your letter has arrived. Its contents are very strange, for these doubts are not newly widespread… As to the differences among human beings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضمون بسیار عجیب زیرا این شبهات تازه اشتهار
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @prophecy and fulfillment, @differences in human capacity, @passage of elementary matter through degrees of existence, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @blind imitation [taqlid]
